globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://cloudflareinsights.com https://*.cloudflareinsights.com; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
